helpPage.intro: Find answers to common questions or contact us if you need more help.
helpPage.contactConsultant: Contact your employment consultant for personal help and guidance.

createCV.q: How do I create a CV?
createCV.a: Go to the CV section and follow the step-by-step guide. You can choose from different templates and get AI help with the wording.

interestGuide.a: The Interest Guide helps you find careers that match your personality and interests. It takes about 10 minutes to complete.

saveJobs.a: When searching for jobs, you can click the heart/save button on each job ad to save it to your job tracker.

multipleCVs.q: Can I have multiple CV versions?
multipleCVs.a: Yes! You can save multiple versions of your CV and choose which one to use for each application.

aiWriter.q: How does the AI letter writer work?
aiWriter.a: The AI analyzes the job ad and your CV to write a cover letter that matches that specific job.

atsAnalysis.a: ATS (Applicant Tracking System) is software that many companies use to filter CVs. Our analysis helps you optimize your CV to get past these systems.

howToSearch.q: How do I search for jobs through the portal?
howToSearch.a: Use the job search function to search among job openings. You can filter by location, profession, and employment type.

saveVsApply.q: What's the difference between saving and applying?
saveVsApply.a: When you save a job, it's added to your job tracker so you can return to it later. Applications are usually made through the company's website.

jobAlerts.q: Can I get notifications about new jobs?
jobAlerts.a: Yes, you can set up job alerts in your settings to receive emails when new jobs matching your criteria are published.

knowledgeBase.q: What can I do in the Knowledge Base?
knowledgeBase.a: The Knowledge Base contains articles, guides, and tips about everything from CV writing to interview techniques and labor law.

exercises.a: The exercises are interactive tools that help you practice various aspects of job searching, like selling yourself or preparing for interviews.

saveArticles.a: Yes! Click the bookmark icon on any article to save it to your bookmarks.

knowledgeWidget.tipsDescription: Tips on CVs, interviews, and job searching

crisis.ariaLabel: Open support and help - for those who are struggling or need someone to talk to
crisis.introText: It takes courage to seek help. If you're feeling down, anxious, or just need someone to talk to - there's always someone who will listen. You don't have to go through this alone.
crisis.alwaysHope: There is always hope, even when it doesn't feel like it right now.

coverLetterWidget.wellWrittenLetterTip: A well-written letter can make the difference between getting an interview or not.
coverLetterWidget.createFirstLetterDescription: A well-written cover letter can make the difference between getting an interview or not. We help you create customized letters for each job you apply for.

tips.customizeTip: Always customize your letter for each job. Mention specific details from the job posting.
tips.nextStepDescription: Register where you've sent your applications to keep track of your progress.

cvWidget.onlyTakesMinutes: It only takes a few minutes

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: Professional and balanced - works for most jobs

structure.introduction: Which job you're applying for + where you saw the ad + briefly why you're interested
structure.motivation: What attracts you to the employer + why you're a good fit for the role
structure.closing: Summarize your value + call-to-action for an interview

tips: Always clearly mention which job you're applying for
Connect your experiences to the job requirements
Show that you've researched the company
Keep it under 1 page

short.name: Short & Concise
short.description: Max 150 words - for simple jobs and staffing agencies

structure.motivation: The core: What can you contribute? (2-3 sentences)
structure.experience: One concrete strength that matches the job
structure.closing: Available for interview + contact details (1-2 sentences)

tips: Max 150 words - every sentence should count
Focus on what's most important
Use bullet points if appropriate
Perfect when energy is low

formal.name: Formal
formal.description: Traditional tone for public sector, banking, insurance, legal

structure.motivation: Professional profile with job role and specialization
structure.closing: Formal closing with offer of additional information

tips: Use formal tone throughout the letter
Mention reference number correctly
Focus on education and formal experience
Avoid overly informal expressions

creative.name: Creative
creative.description: Personal tone for marketing, design, media, startup

structure.motivation: Your story - what drives you in your profession
structure.experience: A concrete project or result + your work style
structure.closing: Creative closing that stands out (within reasonable limits)

tips: Show personality but keep it professional
Use storytelling
Focus on cultural fit
Include a concrete project example

careerChange.name: Career Change
careerChange.description: For career changers switching industries or after a long absence

structure.introduction: Clear introduction about seeking a new direction
structure.experience: What you've done to prepare (courses, internships)
structure.closing: Humble but confident closing about your potential

tips: Address the change directly - don't be defensive
Focus on transferable skills, not what you lack
Show that you've done research and preparation
Be positive about the future, not apologetic about the past

graduate.name: Recent Graduate
graduate.description: For first job after education or internships

structure.motivation: What you learned that's relevant + thesis/internship
structure.experience: Summer jobs, part-time work, volunteer work - focus on soft skills
structure.closing: Humble closing about contributing and learning

tips: Be enthusiastic but not over the top
Highlight thesis and internships as relevant experience
Focus on what you've learned, not just theory
Be open about being new to the role - but show potential
